founder.name: Aria Voss
founder.bio: Ex-DeepMind inference infra. Second-time founder (Vecta -> GitLab, 2021).

company.name: TensorForge
company.one_liner: Drop-in inference runtime that cuts LLM serving cost with continuous batching and quantization.

content.title: Show HN: TensorForge - 60% cheaper LLM inference, open source
content.author: ariavoss

content.note: 12 design partners, 7 in production. Reference call with a Series B customer confirmed ~60% cost reduction and 34M tokens/day served.
